name: Honey-Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Discard giblets and neck of chicken (or save for stock.) Rinse chicken under cold, running water, and pat dry. Set aside.
2. Coat a large nonstick skillet with Pam; place over medium-high heat until hot.
3. Add yellow squash, zucchini, onion, celery, and garlic, and sauté until tender-crisp. Drain.
4. Combine vegetable mixture, breadcrumbs, egg, pecans, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl; stir well.
5. Place chicken, breast side up, on a rack in a roasting pan that has been coated with Pam.
6. Stuff lightly with dressing mixture. Truss chicken (or secure with a ball of foil in the opening).
7. Combine apple juice and honey in a small bowl; stir well. Brush chicken with half of the apple-honey mixture.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1½-2 hours or until drumsticks are easy to move and juices run clear, basting occasionally with remaining apple-honey mixture.
